_README: Sponsor surface config. While enabled=false NOTHING renders (the surface is built but hidden). To go live: set enabled=true and fill `title` with a sponsor name (+ optional url and logo). `logo` may be an absolute https URL or a path under public/ (served BASE_URL-relative, e.g. "sponsor-acme.png"). `byEntity` maps an entity id (marathon-county / wausau-city / wausau-school / your-tax-bill) to a sponsor object to override the suite-wide title sponsor on that page. Keep it tasteful and clearly labeled; never interleave with data.
